title: Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam Lyrics Eththan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Vijay Yesudas, Saindhavi
Song:Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam
Movie: Eththan
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar
Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam, Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam, Nenjil therigirathe
Manasukul etho, Manasukul etho, minnal idikirathe
Paniyin thuligal vizhum pothu,
ilaigal ariyaathe
Unnmugam parthu unnudan irundhaal 
thooram kuraikirathe

Varthai solla thudipathai, Un parvai sollkirathe
Mounam polave oru mozhithaan yethadi
Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam, Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam, Nenjil therigirathe

Ethanayo payanangal vandhathu ponathu ithupol yethumillai
Ennai vittu thalli nindru ennai nane parkiren, paravasam kurayavillai
kathimel nadakum maayam
Indha kadhalil nadakkum, endha valigalum inithidume
Buthiyinai kulappum
aanal manadhuku pidikum, adhu marupadi kulapidume
Kadhal adhu pollaladhu, Kollamale kollum adhu
koocham aacham illadhadhu haiyo haiyo..

Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam, Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam, Nenjil therigirathe
Manasukul etho, Manasukul etho, minnal idikirathe

Chinnathoru punnagai ennenavo pannudhu, ennake puriyavillai
Puyal vandha padagena pulangalum thudikudhu, karaye theriyavillai
Kannil oru kanavu,Vidindhal adhu kanidhida periyadhu,
aanal manam nambivida marukiradhe
Renduketta vayasu, medhuvaai oru thundilai poduthu
Mansum adhil mattikitu mulikiradhu

Penne naalai enna nadakum,
Unnai ennai kanavidikum
Penne naalai enna nadakum,
Unnai ennai....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam conveys themes of love and emotional connection, reflecting the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Eththan, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonists' feelings for each other.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Saindhavi and Vijay Yesudas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam was composed by Taj Noor.

When was this song released?

Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam was released on March 20, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam, the song beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning between the lead characters in Eththan. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and romance, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. As the singers express their emotions, listeners are drawn into a world of tender affection and longing. This song not only enhances the narrative of the film but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mazhaiyudhir Kaalam from Eththan is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Saindhavi and Vijay Yesudas, this song weaves a tapestry of emotions that resonates deeply. The collaboration of talented lyricist Na Muthukumar and music director Taj Noor elevates this track to a memorable experience.
stanzaMeanings: The rainy season, the rainy season, something is stirring in the heart, something is stirring in the heart, lightning is striking. When the drops of rain fall, don’t be unaware. Looking at your face, it feels far away when you are with me.
The words are beginning to speak, your gaze is telling me. Silence is like a language, what is it? The rainy season, the rainy season, something is stirring in the heart.

There’s nothing like this in my experiences. I stand alone, looking at myself, there’s no lack of courage. In this love, whatever paths we take will be sweet. Even if there’s confusion, the heart will still like it, it will again be confused. Love is not bad, it will catch you, it won’t be afraid of anything, oh no!
The rainy season, the rainy season, something is stirring in the heart, something is stirring in the heart, lightning is striking.

A small smile, what does it do? I don’t understand. When the storm comes, the trees shake, I don’t know how to handle it. In the eyes, a dream, if it breaks, it’s a big deal, but the heart doesn’t want to believe it. At this age, it’s like a sudden blow, the mind gets lost in it.
What will happen tomorrow, will you see me? What will happen tomorrow, will you see me?
The rainy season, the rainy season, something is stirring in the heart, something is stirring in the heart, lightning is striking.
The words are beginning to speak, your gaze is telling me. Silence is like a language, what is it? The rainy season, the rainy season, something is stirring in the heart.
The rainy season, the rainy season, something is stirring in the heart, something is stirring in the heart, lightning is striking.
